title: DoorDash Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript: EPS Meets Forecast, Stock Surges
text: DoorDash reported Q4 2024 earnings with an EPS of $0.33, matching forecasts, and revenues of $2.87 billion, slightly surpassing the anticipated $2.84 billion. Following the earnings announcement, DoorDash's stock surged 5.6% in after-hours trading, reaching $203.90. The stock demonstrated significant momentum with a 55.59% return over the past six months. According to InvestingPro data, the stock showed remarkable momentum with a 61.45% return over the past year. DoorDash reported strong growth in monthly active users and order frequency, with expansion efforts in grocery, retail, and new verticals continuing to gain traction. The CFO stated the company focuses on increasing EBITDA dollars, and the international business is growing faster than peers and is gross profit positive. The company remains optimistic about its full-year 2025 outlook, focusing on product improvements, efficiency, and new market opportunities. Total orders increased 19% year over year to 685 million, and Marketplace GOV climbed 21% to $21.3 billion. Adjusted EBITDA more than doubled from the prior year to $566 million, and the company recorded net income of $141 million, a substantial improvement from the prior year loss.
